notes: Core Frogger mechanics work well with proper log/turtle riding, car collisions, home slots, timer, and lives, but the river zone logic has a bug where frog position drifts during animation causing false water deaths, and the home row collision detection is overly strict making it frustrating to land correctly.
The game logic is completely inverted (river is at the bottom, road is at the top), which ruins the classic Frogger home-jump mechanic, and all turtles dive synchronously.

A solid and mostly complete Frogger clone with working movement, hazards, homes, scoring, lives, pause/restart, and no obvious crashes, but it is not flawless due to nonstandard row ordering/layout, simplistic visuals, and some likely gameplay/physics roughness around moving platforms and lane generation.
